exam_arc.title: Final Siege — Signals Gate
exam_arc.description: The final semester exams are imminent. All systems must prioritize academic conquest.

fitness_arc.title: Project Phoenix Body
fitness_arc.description: A focused sprint to rebuild physical foundations. Body realm quests are prioritized and enhanced.
effects: Increased chance for rare Body-related items

coffee_reward.name: Coffee Reward
coffee_reward.description: Permission to buy a fancy coffee from your favorite cafe.

focus_surge.name: Focus Surge
focus_surge.description: Doubles XP gain from all Mind quests for 24 hours.

body_surge.name: Body Surge
body_surge.description: Doubles XP gain from all Body quests for 24 hours.

creative_catalyst.name: Creative Catalyst
creative_catalyst.description: Doubles XP gain from all Creation quests for 24 hours.

spirit_surge.name: Spirit Surge
spirit_surge.description: Doubles XP gain from all Spirit quests for 24 hours.

trinity_core_surge.name: Trinity Core Surge
trinity_core_surge.description: A discounted bundle that doubles XP gain from Mind, Body, and Creation quests for 24 hours.

omni_boost.name: Omni-Boost
omni_boost.description: Doubles XP gain from ALL quests, regardless of realm, for 24 hours.

streak_shield.name: Streak Shield
streak_shield.description: Automatically protects your daily streak for one missed day.

quest_reroll.name: Quest Re-roll
quest_reroll.description: Instantly receive a new set of daily quests from the System.

instant_streak.name: Instant 3-Day Streak
instant_streak.description: Instantly sets your daily streak to 3 days, activating the streak bonus.

mind_adept.name: Mind Adept
mind_adept.description: Reached level 5 in a Mind skill.

body_adept.name: Body Adept
body_adept.description: Reached level 5 in a Body skill.

creation_adept.name: Creation Adept
creation_adept.description: Reached level 5 in a Creation skill.

spirit_adept.name: Spirit Adept
spirit_adept.description: Reached level 5 in a Spirit skill.

initial_story.title: The Awakening
initial_story.narrative: The System activated. Initial diagnostics are complete. A new User entity has been identified. Primary objective: Level Up. The path to multidisciplinary innovation begins now.
